title: sorbus caloneura
intro: Sorbus caloneura, also known as the mountain ash, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sorbus caloneura include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its flowers, leaves, or bark, or by using it in tincture or infusion form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
